transcript:
Watch the center for a second — that pulsing orange core with rings expanding out. It's not decoration, it's labeled in the code as "the production point, not reflection point." Every phrase orbiting outward is literally born there, right when you see it flare.

Now watch one phrase try to swim back toward that center. In the update loop there's a "frustration phase" — every so often a thought lunges inward, the code says "trying to catch the origin," and it always gets pulled back out, "always fails, always pushed back out, there is no catching." That's not metaphor layered on afterward — that's the actual physics of the piece.

And the small words drifting away after — "more," "still," "again" — those spawn from the commentary underneath each thought, comments spawning comments, exactly the regress the piece describes. Even the center's own question, "where is the gap?", cycles on a timer — it doesn't wait for an answer, it just keeps generating the next question. There was never a pause built in for one to arrive.

cues.target: Concentric rings: the production point, not observation point
